query:
UPDATE tasks SET
                            `status` = ?,
                            closed_at = CASE
                                WHEN ? = 'closed' THEN DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%fZ')
                                WHEN `status` = 'closed' THEN NULL
                                ELSE closed_at
                            END,
                            reopen_count = reopen_count + ?,
                            total_reopen_count = total_reopen_count + ?,
                            close_reason = CASE
                                WHEN ? = 'closed' THEN ?
                                ELSE NULL
                            END,
                            updated_at = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%fZ')
                         WHERE id = ?
